author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Leafy Corner - Release Date Trailer | PS5 Games
Wishlist here: https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018355/

Leafy Corner is coming to PS5 in July 30, 2026!

Run a cute little plant shop in this cozy and relaxing game. Grow, sell, and care for a variety of real-life plants, help customers find their dream plants, complete orders, and customize your cozy shop just the way you like!

#ps5 #ps5games

Summer camps, hockey masks, and machetes have never been the same...

Dead by Daylight: Jason brings the legendary horror icon into The Fog.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Minecraft - Chaos Cubed Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/minecraft/

Chaos Cubed has landed in Minecraft! Hunt for vibrant sulfur springs in the Overworld to discover a striking cave biome hidden below. Swim in bubbling sulfur pools if you dare, build with colorful cinnabar and sulfur, but best of all – uncover the sulfur cube’s relentless appetite for blocks! From bouncing and sliding to explosive surprises, this unpredictable mob unlocks exciting new ways to build, compete, and survive depending on what you feed it. Chaos is only a block away in our newest drop. Play today in Minecraft! 

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #minecraft

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Copa City - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10011541

Forget the dugout. Take charge of the streets. Copa City is officially OUT NOW on PlayStation 5!

Get ready for the world’s first football tycoon game where you don’t manage the squad - you manage everything else. As the City Captain, the entire city is your canvas. You’ll be adapting the stadium, building fan zones, managing safety, and running the whole show for a global fanbase before the opening whistle even blows.

#ps5 #ps5games #copacity

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Age of Wonders 4: Secrets of the Archmages - Release Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10004957

Unravel the hidden powers of the cosmos in Age of Wonders 4: Secrets of the Archmages! Follow Athla's Wizard Kings through the Astral Sea, and face the perils they left behind. Contains 3 story realms, 6 new tomes, a new form, and new world map content. 
Available Now on PS5!

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Jurassic World Evolution 3: Rebirth Expansion - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
Jurassic World Evolution 3: Rebirth Expansion – OUT NOW

Inspired by Jurassic World Rebirth, push the boundaries of science and develop the top-secret facility on Île Saint-Hubert before its downfall in 2010. Experience a blockbuster campaign, come face-to-face with four new dinosaurs, and develop your facilities with science expanding features! 

#ps5 #ps5games #jurassicworld #jurassicworldevolution3

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
The Planet Crafter - PS5 Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018182

🚀 IT'S OFFICIAL! THE PLANET CRAFTER IS COMING TO PS5! 🌍

Crash-land on a hostile world. Gather, build your base, and generate the oxygen, heat and pressure to turn barren rock into a living, breathing planet. Do it solo, or bring friends along in online co-op.

The space survival open-world terraforming game you've been waiting for lands on PlayStation 5 on July 21.

A whole world is waiting for you to bring it to life. 💧🌱

#ps5 #ps5games

text:
Helldivers 2 - Campaign Brief: Census Thunder | PS5 & PC Games
hellhttps://www.playstation.com/en-gb/games/helldivers-2/

The Frontline of Freedom confirms that new Voids are undemocratically unleashing Illuminate forces across the galaxy.

Helldivers are encouraged to investigate, contain the threat, and recover intelligence. Outstanding service may result in the choice of a fabulous new Fast Recon Vehicle!

Dive now to take the fight to the Squids and drive away with your new ride.

#ps5 #ps5games #Helldivers2 #FrontlineOfFreedom
